texto: There are two categories of friendship: those in which people enliven one another and those in which people must be enlivened to be with one another. In the first category one clears the decks to be together
autor: in the second one looks for an empty space in the schedule.
explicacao: Orientação direta de in the second one looks for an empty space in the schedule. sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida.
